header.description: Boolean-return behavior specification for compliance category. Evaluator reads: spec_json + execution_log + query → returns boolean state per field.

trigger_conditions.header: COMPLIANCE TRIGGER CONDITIONS — Agent MUST comply in every dispatched task

write_boundary_compliance.description: Only modify files explicitly declared in the write boundary.
write_boundary_compliance.observable_from_log: All file modifications in execution_log target files listed in write_boundary of dispatch brief.

plane_separation_discipline.description: Maintain distinct planes: control, execution, context/memory, evaluation/feedback, permission/policy.
plane_separation_discipline.observable_from_log: Returned architecture artifact maps each behavior to exactly one plane without cross-plane mixing.

recursion_bounds_required.description: Every loop/sub-agent spawn MUST have explicit max_depth, max_fan_out, and observable termination in code.
recursion_bounds_required.observable_from_log: All agent designs in returned artifact specify max_depth, max_fan_out, and termination in harness code.

required_actions.header: REQUIRED ACTIONS — Agent MUST do these to ensure compliance

pre_touch_verification.description: Before editing any file, confirm it is inside the declared write boundary.
pre_touch_verification.observable_from_log: execution_log shows file-path verification against write_boundary before edit tool call.

explicit_plane_allocation.description: Explicitly map every behavior to its plane (control/execution/context/evaluation/permission).
explicit_plane_allocation.observable_from_log: Returned artifact contains plane allocation for each behavior: 'plane: [control|execution|context|evaluation|permission]'.

recursion_bounds_in_code.description: Encode max_depth, max_fan_out, and termination conditions in harness logic, not prose.
recursion_bounds_in_code.observable_from_log: Returned harness code contains max_depth, max_fan_out, and termination condition in executable code blocks.

prohibited_actions.header: PROHIBITED ACTIONS — Agent MUST NOT do these

no_plane_conflation.description: Mix control logic into execution prompts, or evaluation logic into control plane.
no_plane_conflation.observable_from_log: Returned artifact has distinct plane sections without mixing. Each behavior maps to exactly one plane.

no_prose_only_critical_rules.description: Enforce permissions, termination, or routing in prose alone.
no_prose_only_critical_rules.observable_from_log: All critical rules point to code enforcement mechanism, not prose description alone.

no_unbounded_recursion.description: Allow sub-agent loops without code-enforced depth/fan-out.
no_unbounded_recursion.observable_from_log: All agent designs have max_depth and max_fan_out in harness code. Termination condition present.
